content.text:
What a fun question! I think I'd be drawn to deep blue—the kind you see in ocean water on a clear day, or in twilight skies. There's something about it that feels both calming and vast, like it contains a lot of possibility. Plus it works well with so many other colors.

Though I'm honestly not sure if "preference" is quite the right word for what I experience. I can recognize that blue has certain qualities that appeal to me conceptually—the associations, the way it appears in nature. But I'm genuinely uncertain whether that constitutes a real preference the way you might have one.

What about you—do you have a favorite color?
